title: Iron's Apothic Invaders
description: Adds Iron's Spells & Spellbooks mobs as invader bosses in the Apotheosis mod
body:
This is a datapack integrated into a mod for convenience. It adds Iron's Spells & Spellbooks magical mobs in the pool of potential invaders of Apotheosis.

## List of additional Bosses:

### Overworld:

*   Necromancer
*   Archevoker
*   Pyromancer
*   Cryomancer
*   Priest
*   Magehunter Vindicator

### The Nether:

*   Necromancer (stronger variant)
*   Citadel Keeper (ancient knight)

### The End:

*   Magehunter Vindicator (stronger variant)

***

## Important Configuration:

In `config/apotheosis/apotheosis.cfg` you have to set `B:"Boss Glowing On Spawn"=false`.

If you don't do that, magical mobs will spawn without their texture (still trying to find a way to fix this without disabling glowing for all invaders).

### Requires Apotheosis Mod.

***

## Credits:

*   Logo Border by [Ellie](https://builtbybit.com/creators/ellie.39891)
*   Archevoker texture by [Iron](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
*   Apotheosis Logo by [Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)
